The Fog (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,511,112Details
International Box Office $7,537,414
Worldwide Box Office $37,048,526
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,058,784
Total $15,058,784
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,752,917 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:79.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,972 opening theaters/2,972 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $55,062,859

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 14th, 2005 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: January 24th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, disturbing images and brief sexuality.
Running Time: 100 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Remake, Visual Effects
Plot point: Betrayal, Haunting, Medical and Hospitals, Revenge, Extreme Weather
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Time period setting: 1870s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
